stemHtml: The time of sunrise and sunset expressed in LMT varies with the observer’s latitude and..

options.a: The time of year because of the Earth axis’ inclination with respect to the plane of its orbit.
options.b: Longitude because of the Earth axis’ inclination with respect to the plane of its orbit.
options.c: The time of year because of the Earth axis’ perpendicularity with respect to the plane of its orbit.
options.d: Longitude because of the Earth axis’ perpendicularity with respect to the plane of its orbit.
